subject: Re: me & job duties
body:
how much is your current salary

--- Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> wrote:

> *Suggested job duties for me that I hope would help
> you:*
> 
> 
> 
> *Get involved w/ your business/finance life.*
> Reading memos, be your note
> taker in NY meetings, a junior Doug Band or Jay
> Dunn? A business oriented
> Sarah-role. I don't mind being on blackberry call
> after-hours.
> 
> 
> 
> *Learn about your interests*: where beauty comes
> from, negotiation skills,
> personal relationships etc.
> 
> 
> 
> *Learn about antiques*, design, jewelry, watches,
> cars etc. (totally useless
> knowledge)
> 
> 
> 
> Could get involved w/ *residences*.
> 
> 
> 
> *If* *Lesley* has a baby this century and won't come
> back, I could do that
> role as well since it doesn't keep me busy fulltime.
> 
> 
> 
> *Salary inquiry:*
> Between my old age, a soon-to-be-Stern-MBA
> (thanks!), four yrs exciting
> Epstein experience, and wishing new job duties, I
> would really like to
> afford a higher standard of living and to put money
> away.
> 
> 
> Different note: I saw Marie-Lise at the Hampton polo
> game yesterday. I
> went w/ my new Swedish boy-something… See our pic.
> Thank you for giving me
> invite! :)
> 
> 
> *It's very thoughtful to ask what I want to do!
> Thank you, and THANK YOU for
> making me a Stern MBA, Jeffrey! :)*
> 
> Always, Cecilia :)
>

body_html:
how much is your current salary

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

Suggested job duties for me that I hope would help
you:

Get involved w/ your business/finance life.
Reading memos, be your note
taker in NY meetings, a junior Doug Band or Jay
Dunn? A business oriented
Sarah-role. I don't mind being on blackberry call
after-hours.

Learn about your interests: where beauty comes
from, negotiation skills,
personal relationships etc.

Learn about antiques, design, jewelry, watches,
cars etc. (totally useless
knowledge)

Could get involved w/ residences.

If Lesley has a baby this century and won't come
back, I could do that
role as well since it doesn't keep me busy fulltime.

Salary inquiry:
Between my old age, a soon-to-be-Stern-MBA
(thanks!), four yrs exciting
Epstein experience, and wishing new job duties, I
would really like to
afford a higher standard of living and to put money
away.

Different note: I saw Marie-Lise at the Hampton polo
game yesterday. I
went w/ my new Swedish boy-something… See our pic.
Thank you for giving me
invite! :)

It's very thoughtful to ask what I want to do!
Thank you, and THANK YOU for
making me a Stern MBA, Jeffrey! :)

Always, Cecilia :)
